channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: There are NO jobs left — 35 replies — 140.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
There are NO jobs left

Open thread • Replies: 35 • Updated: 2026-04-07 14:16 UTC

OP

> 8 in 10 jobs posted online are FAKE
> those 2 in 10 jobs that aren't fake are all looking for either a buddy, family member, internal, senior level, or a literal unicorn for their positions

It's truly the end times now, isn't it?

Early replies (first 3)

62084288
Now you see why war is necessary. That will create a ton of jobs that you can do.

62084296
>>62084281
There's plenty of jobs it just the wages won't go up. I quit my shitty QC job and got another one a week later.

62084378
>>62084281
yeah there literally arent.. all these companies keep firing tens of thousands of people and we barely create any jobs

even dog shit mcwage jobs are impossible to get. Before covid you put in 10 applications and got a 3 stage interview into offer. Now its all fucked up

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62084427
>>62084394
dude ive been noticing that exact thing its funny as fuck.. Every five guys, mcdonalds, wendys i walk into is literally all mexicans speaking strictly Spanish to each other. There is that one token bilingual guy who sits at the cash register because no on else that works there has any clue wtf is going on

seriously its gotten to the point its impossible to not notice. Ive been not paying attention and ignoring it for a while but yeah its at an insane stage now. I live in a pretty affluent big US city

62084564
>>62084427
My local place is all thicc latinas. It’s wonderful

62084597
>>62084281
If it’s any consolation, this isn’t new. Even before ai, HR was still flooding the boards with fake job postings and filtering you with their algorithms.

62084622
>>62084288
Are you willing to kill for cash?

Are you willing to die for cash?

Are you willing to get yelled at and only have 5 minute showers for cash?

Are you willing to run for an ungodly amount of miles for cash?

62084633
>>62084281
You can join the army and fight for Israel

62084881
>>62084288
I'm sure once the draft captures and culls a chunk of the population more positions will be available, true.

62084910
>>62084881
There’s no draft you dumbass fudposter. America did 20 years in Afghanistan without one, we won’t need one now

62084973
>>62084910
AI creates an intense need for a draft though.

62085020
i can barely get 100 dollars, trump's war has ruined my country

62085050
>>62084622
yes
no
yes
I do it for free

Never signing up btw

62085265
>>62084394
i no longer eat fast food because of this. brown stinking mystery meat shit skins gibber jabbering in a grotesque slave language? no thanks!

62085276
>>62084394
>>62084427
>>62085265
why would you want to work in a fast food with subhuman shitskins to begin with?

also stop eating this shit, it gives ass cancer

learn a trade if you are that desperate, tell a white business owner you can work for free for 2-3 months in order to learn the job

no one is going to refuse that

62085278
>>62085276
>learn a trade if you are that desperate, tell a white business owner you can work for free for 2-3 months in order to learn the job
jewish hands typed this post.

62085283
>>62085278
im eastern european and it dont seethe over shitskins to have a mcwagie job

62085287
>>62084281
Yes, the only thing left is to rage against the machine that created this system by shitposting things glowie Jannies hate.
>no job
Make their lives miserable
>no gf
Motivate them to send you a mk ultra sex kitten honeypot gf
>can’t afford gas
Blame Israel and American politicians until everyone wakes up to the true cause of our suffering

You have your marching orders and solutions to this problem

62085288
>>62085283
>romanian contemplating what he would do for a job, assuming he ever actually had to get a job

62085289
>>62084281
I've always got work for you, wagie. Always.

62085290
>>62084973

62085292
>>62084378
>10 applications and got a 3 stage interview into offer. Now its all fucked up
crazy how you don't realize how broken that system is, and you're romanticizing it.

But 2019 was definitely better than now. 2014 even. 2009 even.

62085296
>>62085288
the unemployment rate in my country is 3,4% and this is not even counting all the people working for cash and just paying their healthcare insurance to the state that are counted in the unemployed group

you got your diversity, your inclusivity and your fairness now you reap what you sow mutto, my country is whiter than yours and we have jobs

62085308
>>62084281
Just keep trying bro. She's out there somewhere waiting :)

62085317
Got a jeet calling me about a job processing visas for jeets because they need an american. 20/hr but it's a 45 minute commute by train, gotta pay for the train. Lol. It was actually a week ago so he might have moved on to another. I wonder what jeets call goyim? Mleccha I think.

All jobs have dumb requirements like this. I got two degrees and speak Jap/Kor but they probably won't hire me to their 22/hr IP assistant job because I never worked in IP before. They don't seem to know what they want, or have a shortlist of very specific candidates already on hand.

62085323
>>62085317
kek go work for the jeets. get in on the jeet scams. become the jeet king

62085328
>>62085323
To be fair I think it's a 'legit' job since it's about processing H1Bs and getting them into the country, it's just it pays shit and
>jeets

62085331
>>62085296
kek you actually are a gypsy aren't you. That's sad. If your people were employed and rich, 25% of you wouldn't be living in fucking london and paris scrubbing toilets.

62085333
>american website
>americans talking about american problems in american english
>random third world esl comes in and starts seething about how he owns a 300 year old commieblock apartment on the outskirts of the bombed out post-soviet bunker that is his capital city
>I'M WHITEEEEEEEEEEEE (gypsy, mixed with turk DNA)
Every time. Why go to romanian speaking websites if you seethe at americans, you can just be the diversity shitting up our websites kekaroo.

62085342
>>62085331

62085368
>>62085331
>>62085342
actually the gypsies went to the UK and Germany because we were treating them like dogs

now we are a white ethnostate and you are 56% white

62086034
>>62085317
Get hired.
Process them all completely wrong.
Call ICE on the ones that fail because of their screwed up paperwork.

62086103
>>62085368
You live in the third world bro. No one cares about Romania

item.title: So, now that assblaster was confirmed controlled opposition, and LINK holders have become "the Cuckolds of Crypto"... — 50 replies — 89.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
So, now that assblaster was confirmed controlled opposition, and LINK holders have become "the Cuckolds of Crypto"...

Open thread • Replies: 50 • Updated: 2026-04-07 13:43 UTC

OP

So, now that assblaster was confirmed controlled opposition, and LINK holders have become "the Cuckolds of Crypto"... shouldn't we have a look at what he told us *not* to buy?

He tried very hard to steer us away from one coin in particular back in 2018.

They wanted you out.

Early replies (first 3)

62077049
well he was right about raiblocks

62077089
>>62077049
Only in the sense that he was "right" about LINK. It's price did go up, yet it achieved nothing. Sergey met Trump and still nobody cares about smartcontracts. LINK had every chance to succeed but failed.

>Controlled opposition is a political or strategic tactic where a governing body, organization, or elite group secretly supports, infiltrates, or manages its own opposition to manipulate dissent, control narratives, and prevent real challenges to the status quo

A functional stateless currency would challenge the status quo, and now it's been "over 5 years under the radar".

Watch how long this thread stays up.

62077098
>>62077000
>>62077049
>>62077089
Bullish for XRP

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62078620
>>62078618
The only thing that's "worryingly low" is LINK's price xD

The only thing its adopted are cuckolds online like you

62078663
>>62077915
Is Ari one of us?

62078703
HOLY SHIT

By sheer chance I happened to be watching Sunny today, "The gang finds a dumpster baby", and recognised one of the frames Asslarper used (pic related).

In this episode, Dennis (AB's avatar) convinces an activist to CHAINLINK himself to a tree, then LITERALLY KEKS him.

Now do you believe me?

Inverse Assblaster; what did he tell you was useless?

Raiblocks and Ripple.

Time is running out.

62078711
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62078735
He even admitted his intentions in one of his final posts.

This ARG goes DEEP.

62078857
>>62078703
everyone needs to see this

62078921
>>62078618
But didn't you originally intend to make money?
Or are you like a sportsball fan that pays the team regardless of outcome and don't share in the winnings?

62079599
>>62078703
cuckolds of crypto.

It was there the whole time.

62079836
>>62078703
There it is folks.

"Cuckolds of crypto" was planned all along.

If you're still holding LINK after seeing this... well, you deserve what's next.

62079965
>>62078735
Link was .30-.40 when he posted this.

62079978
>>62077648
You mean the schizo posts about the referenced world vs the whatever the fuck he called the “new world”

62080163
>>62077915
that's a lot of manufactured horseshit for
>be at the right place at the right time

62080436
>>62079836
pool's closed / thanks for keeping this a link board.

62080485
>>62077089
Thread's still up and likely will be for days because this is a dead board, the irony of you making fun of one group of shitcoin holders for invoking hidden lore/"its a sekret" terminology and doing the same thing in your thread, nobody fucking cares about xrp you boomer faggot.
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOM!

62080493
>12 pbtid
>about raiblocks
Hmmm

62080684
>>62080485
>this is a dead board
It's a dead site, dude. It was fucking swamped with non-whites years ago and they all just go to /b/, /v/ and /pol/ for their le epic psyops and bait threads. All the average intelligence white people that used to be on this website are gone. I dunno where they went. A lot to Twitter, I guess.

62080692
>>62080684
>twitter
Yeah I think so. I’m not smart but I am white and I can’t believe it but I spend a far more amount of time on x now than 4chins. I’ve been here every waking minute since 2011 and never thought this place could be so fucking boring and gay.

62080695
>>62080684
That's true, probably why adem feels so at home here.

62081569
>>62078703
Assblaster convinced /biz/ to CHAINLINK themselves to a SINGULAR TREE and then cuckolded them!

The cuckolds of crypto was planned out, years in advance.

62081749
>>62078703
>>62081569
This is educational

/biz/ got psyopped, no doubt about it

>A SINGULAR TREE
>TONIGHT, STRAP IN

Inverse Assblaster

62081755
>>62080485
thread's still up because I didn't use "the N word"

Any threads that explicitly state Raiblock's new name or ticker quickly get taken out.

Don't believe me?

It's all in the archives

https://warosu.org/biz/thread/59678970
https://warosu.org/biz/thread/59678347
https://warosu.org/biz/thread/59671138
https://warosu.org/biz/thread/59600393
https://warosu.org/biz/thread/59538201

62082372
>>62078703
It's game over for stinkies

62082722
>>62078703
BOOOOOOOOOOOM

cuckolds of crypto!

62082884
>>62078703
remember when hillary talking about pepe was a big deal

62083016
>>62080684
why exactly did this site die off so quickly

x is awful and they're always changing the algorithms
plebbit hasn't been useable for at least 6 years due to insane moderation
every traditional forum is dead

where the hell did everyone go

62083040
>>62083016
Crypto isn't exciting since 2017 ended

Why?

Because people forgot what we were doing here to begin with

People forgot about Raiblocks

Tonight, they will be reminded

62084453
>>62083016
Moot was a spineless coward and Hiroshimoot doesn't give two shits about anything so long as the ad money stays flowing, so White men left for Twitter, a website that actually has influence on things.

62084638
>>62084453
>muh tweets are makin' a difference
they're just as useless as 4chan posts

62085762
>>62084453
yeah that makes sense
just sucks because the format here is so much easier to read

62085897
fuck all stinkies hate em all think they suck\fuck all stinkies hate em all think they suck\fuck all stinkies hate em all think they suck

item.title: >OPEN THE STRAIT — 17 replies — 68.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>OPEN THE STRAIT

Open thread • Replies: 17 • Updated: 2026-04-07 14:06 UTC

OP

>OPEN THE STRAIT

Early replies (first 3)

62085648
the us are paper tigers

the EU should launch bulgaria to conquer alaska meanwhile france annihilate new york and the UK make los angeles a parking slot

62085654
Is he actually going to do something or is this a supreme TACO?
The threats are getting more bold and insane, from both sides, something has to give eventually, right?

62085721
>>62085654

He already bombed Kharg Island.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62085727
>>62085721
ok but he claimed that he'll erase Iranian civilization tonight
Bombing a bunch of bunkers is not quite the same

62085746
>>62085648
THIS AND GERMANY TO ERADICATE ISRAEL, JUST FOR OLD TIMES SAKE!

62085774
>>62085654
what if its just internet talk and the overall malaise over the last 18 months just goes on for 10-20 more years and nothing actually happens

62085779
>>62085654
While Trump and the fake news keep everyone focused on his left hand the right hand has probably killed thousands of Iranian citizens at this point. But nobody reads past the headlines and the Jewish media doesn't show the full damage, just like they don't show the full damage to Israel or the UAE.

62085782
>>62085746
germans are bootlickers

62085807
>>62085648

> Alaska
> Los Angeles
> New York

Most people in the US probably wouldn't even care, tbqhf.

62085839
Relax. We don't even use the strait.

62085844
>>62085637
Why?

62085862
>>62085779
>killed thousands of Iranian citizens at this point
So? Literally who cares about mass murder of civilians? Gaza established that you can kill as many people as you want and literally nobody cares. Stop being a moralfag we live in a post-morality word where murder is okay

62085901
>>62085844

62085926
>>62085862
>nobody cares
I care

62085941
nothing ever happens

62085975
>>62085862
Everbody cares about the death of innocents. You're not even a real person, you're literally either a computer program, paid shill, or an actual NPC level mind that has internalized what computer programs and paid shills have told him to believe. If you're in that last category, you'll learn to care eventually, even if it takes a thousand years, because the human spirit is unstoppable.

62086024
>>62085654
It's a taco supreme. In the 11th hour he'll claim that Iran made a deal with him. This will come as a surprise to many, including the Iranians

item.title: How much would you pay for a home in USA? — 22 replies — 48.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
How much would you pay for a home in USA?

Open thread • Replies: 22 • Updated: 2026-04-07 13:50 UTC

OP

How much would you pay for a home in USA?

Early replies (first 3)

62084297
>>62084290
$100 /sqft

62084299
>>62084290
Everyone I know who went to Fort Huachuca said it's a shit hole in the desert.

62084302
>>62084290
I'd buy that house depending on the location

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62084317
>>62084302
>>62084299
>>6208429
Demos
>While the U.S. population is primary Caucasian, there are a multitude of European ethnic diversities along with between 32% to almost 40% having Hispanic origination

Military info
>Sierra Vista is a military town. As home to Army post, Fort Huachuca, there are approximately 2,600 active duty military personnel assigned to Fort Huachuca. There is also approximately 2,400 military trainees (students) temporarily assigned to the Fort for training on any given day and more than 8,000 trained on site each year. Additionally, the Fort employs approximately 3,000 civilian workers and an additional 400 civilians working for other agencies operating on the installation.

62084343
>>62084290
0

62084386
>>62084290
I'm planning to move someplace warm when my mother finally croaks. I'll probably spend about half a million on a place.

62084407
Depends on where. Pennsylvania between Hershey and Wilmigton is nice, would pay maybe 50K for something in OP pic. But its too close to DC, so it goes for 300K, so not thank you

62084414
With a pod you can live anywhere.

62084437
>>62084414
who needs a pod when there are desperate boomers that need tenants for their "investment" and are deep under water. I might have found some new victim. I might pull off the old scam, fixed rent 5% over market price, make the boomer believe its just short term, shell him 5000 extra under the table for an unlimited contract, "because one never knows if it might take a semester more", and then dont move out for the next 10 years

62084444
>>62084414
do you have planning permission for that structure? zoning laws check out? pay property tax? pod license status?

62084699
>>62084299
im not saying it isnt a shithole, but where in this thread is fort huachuca mentioned...or are you just so tuned in on the real estate in the area you recognized the house?

62084723
>>62084699
thats why op is a retard, he should at least post the state so we have some reference because a house in CA/FL/NY is worth much more than some flyover state and even inside the state you'll have varying degrees of value based on city/neighborhood etc

62084731
>>62084299
I was stationed there to train intelligence MOS soldiers. The surrounding city is a shithole, and the next biggest city Tucson is only slightly less shitty. Phoenix is barely tolerable until you get up into Scottsdale. In general there's a reason why Arizona is a cheap place to live.

62084740
>>62084297
I paid 10x that...

62084753
>>62084290
30-50k, if owning was free.
It would need to be in florida or cuckfornia outskirts of bigger city and area would need to be good.

thats around what i'm willing to pay for 3rd world vacation house and thats what I can get in Japan and south/east Europe.

62084808
>>62084290
You couldn't pay me to live in the US while the orange cheetoh is in charge haha

62085490
>>62084414
Even a sarcopod?

62085835
>they aren’t saving money on rent by living in a shed
NGMI losers

62085866
>>62084753
You must be poor as fuck if you're fantasizing about beachfront vacation homes in perfect weather states for 30-50k lmao
Never gonna happen, Ranjesh

62085890
>>62084290
I just want a 5,000 sqft 1-story home with 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms.

62085917
>>62085890
Do you understand how huge that is for a 3 bed, 2 bath? Do you want an indoor baseball field? Bowling alley?

62085924
>>62085917
Yes...

https://www.houseplans.net/floorplans/357100024/modern-farmhouse-plan-4090-square-feet-4-bedrooms-5-bathrooms

item.title: Safe investments — 20 replies — 46.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Safe investments

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-04-07 13:51 UTC

OP

What are safe investments? Historically, the answer has been US bonds. Now, is it China, Swiss and Australian bonds that are the safest?
Aside from bonds, what other investments can project money?
Hard mode: no precious metals.

Early replies (first 3)

62081276
>>62081251
people say index funds so i guess those

62081282
>>62081251
Car parts
Tobacco
Marketable skills
SOXL

62081295
>>62081251
>Aside from bonds, what other investments can project money?
Probably one of these bad boys.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62081611
deep otm calls on wolfspeed

62081698
>>62081251
>safe investments
Gold

62081700
>>62081251
50x leveraged private credit etf

62081704
>>62081251
Land.
Forests.
Most real estate (anything you can rent out).

62081888
Literally Israel. As long as the US exists to fund it that is.

62081963
Human trafficing

62083536
>>62081251
Fascinating question

62083544
>>62081704
Real estate loses value once property taxes, building depreciation and inflation are factored in

62084739
>>62083544
Wrong

62084775
>>62081251
Helium

62084848
>>62081251
urea
>>62084775
I used the last few balloons worth in stock, sorry bro we're all out

62084892
>>62081251
DIY skills, tools, and the quality products that you can make yourself.

62084894
>>62084848
>lives in clownworld
>isn't balls deep in helium
Ngmi

62085068
Farmland, wheat and livestock, a bunker, and rosaries, because you're gonna need to pray to God that the US doesn't decide to nullify every asset on earth before it dies.

62085104
>>62081251
Honey, maple syrup, alcohol, research chemicals, nitrogen fertilizer, propane, solar panels, wood chipper, sawmill, guns, skid steer, knee pads, lube

62085188
>>62083544
Thankfully you can depreciate real estate so you don't pay income tax from them

62085934
>>62085188
Even with that tax write off real estate still loses value with everything factored in

item.title: What the fuck happening here? — 11 replies — 44.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
What the fuck happening here?

Open thread • Replies: 11 • Updated: 2026-04-07 14:13 UTC

OP

>Xrpguy.png
>XRPtothemoon.png
>XRPmassive.png
>XRPsuit.png
>Xrp_taxi.png
I got banned for the smallest bullshit, but this retard keeps spamming the same XRP nonsense over and over again shitting up the entire biz and doesn’t get banned. Even if he is IP hopping, why aren’t threads being pruned?

Early replies (first 3)

62085664
Advertising and begging that is being ignored

62085726
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM!

62085729
>meta xrp thread
BOOOOOOOOM

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62085756
>>62085652
Two or three of these and an imminent crash is confirmed. Nothing better than trading against social media, 4chins in particular.

62085773
XRP acquired some company that is already integrated in the SWIFT network. Unfortunately, most of their use case relies on a stablecoin. Only a very small percentage used XRP (est. 2%). If they ever claimed that percentage of the annual market then the current market cap of XRP is way overvalued.
If there are major favorable regulatory changes, beyond just the clarity act, they could accesa the B2B market where the real money is. That's probably at least a decade away before it's even considered seriously. If ever.
Nostra/Vostra will never be replaced. ODL offers an interesting and maybe sometimes convenient supplement to it. Pre-funded USD balances in accounts at each end of cross-border transactions are still necessary.

62085796
>>62085664
>>62085726
>>62085729
>>62085756
>>62085773

So fucking bullish at XRP

62085847
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62085918
>>62085773
>XRP acquired some company that is already integrated in the SWIFT network
The vast majority of financial players on earth are integrated in or connected to the Swift network in some way.
Just how dumb are you really?

62085995
>>62085652
Linkfaggots have been doing this whenever they get pissed to try and make people angrier at XRP. It has been happening more and more since Nov 2024, not just these last couple of days.

62086012
>>62085652
Someone paid off the tranny janny discord to allow XRP shill threads to go undeleted. It's that simple. It has happened before and it will happen again.

62086077
>>62085652
breadcrumbs masquerading as a privileged shilling campaign
you will cry that you didn't throw even ten bucks at this "obvious scam"
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XvQyL8827Ww

item.title: WHY ARE WE PUMPING GIVE ME CHEAPIES — 10 replies — 40.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
WHY ARE WE PUMPING GIVE ME CHEAPIES

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-04-07 14:13 UTC

OP

WHY ARE WE PUMPING
GIVE ME CHEAPIES

Early replies (first 3)

62081643
It's TACO monday, bitch. Enjoy the ride. The dumping shall begin later.

62081656
>>62081643
There's nothing to to taco. Iran already said no. Trump already blew up a nuclear power plant (4 times!) their biggest bridge, their largest oil facility, etc etc. Oil is on its way to $200 a barrel. The Japanese carry trade is dead due to Japan's bonds soaring. The market has priced stocks and crypto completely wrong.

62081657
>>62081656
But 100 to 120 is perfectly pricing in the current situation. Remember it would be 60 instead.
And markets are not overrated, the dollar is just worth less.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62081670
>>62081656
Who cares? One Truth Social post is more powerful than reality, faggot. You open your shorts on wednesday, close them on sunday and open a long before the futures market opening. Simple as

>BUT REALITY!!!!
It's all fake

62081673
Yeah i was expecting 50k bitcoin by now..

62081682
>>62081670
for now, but it will all come crashing down eventually, just watch.

62081683
>>62081641
Its easter monday, the stock market should be closed. The Jews would never operate on a christian holiday...

62081714
>>62081670

The only reason we're pumping now is because everyone expects it to work again this week even though there are no real indications for it (both oil and gold haven't budged much in the past few days). At this point everyone expects this pattern, and you know what happens once everyone starts getting in on it expecting a sure thing...

62081922
>>62081643
>>62081656
What is taco other than the Mexislop version?

62086081
>>62081670

Did you open your shorts yet?

item.title: /biz/: WHAT DAY IS IT?! — 9 replies — 36.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
/biz/: WHAT DAY IS IT?!

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-04-07 14:15 UTC

62085496

item.title: >I would be a millionaire right now had I not sold my BTC 10 years ago How do I stop the suicidal thoughts whenever I am… — 20 replies — 33.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
>I would be a millionaire right now had I not sold my BTC 10 years ago How do I stop the suicidal thoughts whenever I am…

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-04-07 13:41 UTC

OP

>I would be a millionaire right now had I not sold my BTC 10 years ago
How do I stop the suicidal thoughts whenever I am in the middle of the wagecage?

Early replies (first 3)

62084173
just think about how SBF's doing right now

62084179
>>62084173
Probably getting gaped, if he's lucky he got his adderall prescription behind bars and therefore maybe he's enjoying it

62084180
>>62084173
He got bailed out of jail thanks to the jews overlords, and has tons of millions of stolen dollars free to use whenever he wants.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62084217
>>62084159
there are opportunities constantly. every year hundreds of stocks 10x. every day hundreds of options 10x.

62084300
>>62084159
U can still becum a millionaire if you buy beyond meat stocks or anything yuan treasury bonds

62084390
>>62084159
Console yourself with the possibility that you died from rockfish poisoning while vacationing in Australia in the timeline where you had millions and years of free time to kill

62085113
>>62084217
with money from 10x more stocks crashing to 10%.

62085118
>>62084173
>a mere 5 years later his Anthropic shares would be worth $30 billion today if he hadn't gotten greedy and stolen from his customers at FTX

62085192
You could be me. I bought bitcoin in 2013 when it was like 15 usd a coin and spent it all on drugs from black market reloaded and silk road.

62085206
You don't, you let it eat away and consume you forever.

62085214
>>62085192
you gotta admit the acid was totally worth it though

62085225
>>62085118
Kek
Outjewed by his own hand

62085227
>>62085214

Never tried acid. Mostly research chemicals, weed and shrooms. I also bought quarter sticks of dynamite and put one inside of a tree one time and it almost fell over the explosion was so big. This was back when you could buy literally anything, including grenades, fully automatic weapons, pistols with no serial #'s etc. Black Market reloaded didn't last that long it was shoa'd pretty quickly by feds.

62085229
>>62084159
well, you buy chainlink, watch your networth shrink to nothing very slowly and find a very tall place....

62085245
>>62084159
If you didnt sell 10 years ago you would have sold 8 years ago or 5 years ago. Then you still would have paid maybe close to half in taxes. So you would still most likely be right where you are today even if you didnt sell 10 years ago, this is the reality of investing. Just make as much money as you can and dont dwell on that bullshit

62085284
>>62085245
>Then you still would have paid maybe close to half in taxes
capital gains tax is around 20% in most countries

62085302
>>62084159
Very few people held past 10x, never mind 100x or 1000x. Smart people offload portions instead of selling it all and always keep a moonshot. You are just not smart and you probably would have blown that wealth on dumb shit like a sports car and an overpriced house in a suburb.
Your BTC is in better hands now.
>>62084300
Kek what is the bull case for BYND?

62085854
>>62084159
You stop them by realizing you sold when it made sense
Stop overanalyzing your decision process in a vacuum. Being paralyzed by hindsight will only garner more myopia to miss whatever the next opportunity that comes around your circles of interest
>t. former 100+ btc holder that is now broke af as well

62085868
>>62084159
I had an old work friend that is in the same situation as you. You might even be him. As I recall his new wife made him sell his BTC to pay for some stupid bullshit like a down payment on a car or whatever the fuck. He basically went insane and became super liberal and started worrying about trans rights and absolutely obsessing over Trump. His new hobby of being crazy helps him to pretend that money is not important as long as there are children out there that haven't been brainwashed, mutilated and sterilized by their insane mothers. Anyway.. his real problem isn't the missed opportunity for money. It's that he's married to a psychopath that manipulates him. They don't even have kids so his biological imperative was betrayed as well as his finances. Women are fucking evil.

62085887
>>62084159
me but 12 years ago
no point crying over spilled milk OP

item.title: any WFH chads can you tell me how you found your job I have hospitality, customer service and even low level management… — 15 replies — 29.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
any WFH chads can you tell me how you found your job I have hospitality, customer service and even low level management…

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-04-07 13:46 UTC

OP

any WFH chads can you tell me how you found your job
I have hospitality, customer service and even low level management experience but im not getting any offers on my applications
Should I get some cyber security certs? which ones should I focus on if yes?

Early replies (first 3)

62084718
Funny of you to ask OP, I remember my struggles of landing my first WFH job. Btw, WFH stands for Work from Home because not many people come across that term usually. But, if you must ask, our company is headquartered in Nashville. My base pay is 95k per year along with a COL stipend and generous health and pension benefits. As we speak, I am clocked into my position in the beautiful hot springs in British Columbia. We do have an RTO policy, but I haven't been to the office in 4 years! Ha-Ha! You COULDN'T pay me to work in the office. Yesterday I had fun fucking a uni student that transferred from china for the school years, so yeah life is great so far. Today she is making me her traditional Chinese dinner as a thank you for fucking her so nicely. Maybe next month I'll fly out to Holland and do my job for the month. But like I said OP, keep your chin up and don't be disuaded by the multiple rejection emails in your future until you get that golden offer. Take it and run with it. Anyways .... Chiao!

62084729
>>62084718
thanks for the response anon
Did you use indeed or pay for a website that specializes in WFH jobs like flexjobs etc? I'm wondering if indeed is just all scams at this point and if it might be worth it to pay a job finding website to filter the garbage

62084746
There are no jobs anymore. 200,000 people have been laid off in the last six months while job creation is negative. 90% of job openings go to immigrants anyway.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62084747
>>62084729
Mainly family connections.

62084759
>>62084746
>no more jobs
They hire new people every day faggot. Go post your demoralization shit somewhere else

62084791
>>62084746
yeah, I guess i'll just keep shitposting about the epstein files on /x/ until something works out

62084803
>>62084678
WFH is common in the technical writing field

62084965
>>62084718
Holy comfy
GIWTWM

62085002
>>62084678
so many green id’s in this thread
good sign op

62085269
>>62084791
best to give up and just hate on glowies by posting things they hate like Epstein
your inability to find a job is a sign to make their lives miserable or else they would make sure you found work

62085740
Demoralizers are right. Your best bet is to make a YouTube channel going over the Epstein files. That shit is huge now. Everyone here should be doing 4chan schizo shit on social media because everything we’ve been talking about, banker greed, Epstein abuse, conspiracy, ww3 apocalypse is now becoming mainstream. Most of you saw this coming. Time to capitalize on it

62085750
>>62085740
>Demoralizers are right about there being no more normie jobs

62085875
>>62084678
>Should I get some cyber security certs? which ones should I focus on if yes?
No, because literally every retard like you has decided that cybersecurity is a comfy do-nothing job and EVERYONE has flooded the industry. There were not enough cyber security jobs 10 years ago, there sure aren't enough today now that it has been meme'd as retard daycare.

62085899
>>62084678
Honestly data analytics is an easy WFH career path. Just learn SQL and either PBI, Tableau, or Qlik depending on what company you want to work for. Maybe some python would be good too, but I got a job a few years ago basically only knowing SQL and making a follow along tutorial Tableau dashboard.

62085904
>>62085875
Exactly this. OP should focus their attention on destroying glowfucks and not something that only neckbeard redditors want to do. Cybersecurity was always fake and for fags

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 261 replies — 62.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 261 • Updated: 2026-04-07 10:08 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62068446
12 more hours and the thread will be alive for 30 days and that's when Gavin Wood gives me 11.5k DOT for my "influencing" of your young Vishnus of the mindchain.

62068604
i buy this shit at 6.6$ or -75% from ATH
NOW I M AT -90% DOWN

62068658
>>62068604
yeah the decline of this shit has been remarkable. and it still somehow has a $2 billion market cap.

62069192
>>62068658
im very disappointed

62069282
>>62069192
Good. Now sell so I can GIGA short it some more while shilling it on 4chan. You activated my trap card anon "Backstabbing shill" (Effect: Convince people DOT is THE SOLUTION while having a giga short open at the same time).

62071796
100$ end of bull run. And it's official, the thread has stayed alive for 30 days and therefore Gavin Wood will pay me 11.5k$. That will feed Mumbai for literally a whole year.

Thank you Vishnu

62072073
>>62071796
You're welcome.

Don't I get a little something

62073144
>>62072073
But of course Panjali, your are a citizen of Mumbai city, the city of DOT. Every citizen gets paid. We all get feed and loved by our kind lord Gavin Wood. He is the underworld CP kingpin. He sells Cheese Pizza and then redistributes the funds among DOT holders. Everyone in Mumbai is eating and licking Cheese Pizza. I also like to put some cream onto my Cheese Pizza and then lick it off.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62075463
100$ end of bull run

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62077075
Every day after the 30th day I get 150 DOT as a bonus. If we keep the thread alive for 30 more days I'll get 30 * 150 = 4500 more DOT. Please help contribute so my village of Mumbai gets feed.

62078039
>>62077075
You are not in India

62078216
>>62078039
This is my hand >>62008295 young Vishnu. This was taken directly from Mumbai, the city of DOT.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62078593
Dont selling my dotty anymore

62078595
75

62078631
Depressing thread

62078789
>>62078216
Fake

62079572
>>62078631
Well, I've already got my 11.5k DOT that Gaving promised me and every day this thread stay alive I get an additional 150DOT. Doesn't really seem depressing to me

>>62078593
>>62078595
100$ END OF BULL RUN

>>62078789
I am brown as chocolate itself. I am a true Mumbai warrior

Thank you for keeping the thread alive my Mumbai warriors. You are feeding your village. This is a cooperative effort. The mumbai boys strike AGAIN


Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62079598
This is the most damaging thread for dot in history

62079614
>>62079598
Read this >>62069282. We're playing this whole board. They're eating right out of our hands. First we make them believe that DOT is held by the GLAMOROUS citizens of Mumbai. Then at the same time we pocket the money from Gavin Wood for keeping the thread alive. AND at the same time we SHORT IT TO 0$. The whole city of Mumbai is in on it. INDIA SUPER POWER BY 2020 wasn't a lie. It's a FACT for 6 years already.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62079649
>>62079614
But is the tech good?

62079750
>>62079649
Literally THE BEST chain currently. And no, I'm not just making shit up. It literally does what everyone else is trying to do. Once JAM + NOMT hit it'll be able to do MILLIONS of TPS (not just value tx) while doing continous compute, while being 100% decentalized, while the tx will be CHEAP, while having NATIVE interoperability, while being able to control other chains and never leave DOT, ... This projects is THE project and people are still buying meme coins. It's UNFATHOMABLE.

62080914
I hope you guys smell the bottom. I can smell the bottom of the Vishnu mindchain. I hope you're going in HARD and DEEP. I hope you guys are PENETRATING THE BOTTOM of the market. I hope you're bouncing up and down on that bottom. I hope you're eating that bottom out and scooping it up. Mmmm, that delicious Vishnu bottom. It has a great taste inside my mouth. I hope you guys are enjoying it as much as I am. I'll leave some cream for you so it tastes even better.

62080937
>>62079649
DOT is literally the most superior blockchain out there. Everything that other people promise and don't deliver DOT already has. Everything that other people lie about and can't do DOT can do. The really BIG upgrade we're waiting on is JAM and NOMT this year
Read more here >>62026407 and >>62056612 and >>62056570. NOMT + JAM scale the network to more a few million or maybe 10-20m TPS. We currently have the highest recorded TPS on a live network (https://data.parity.io/spammening). 143.3k TPS on a live network (NOT TEST NET BULLSHITERY like the other chains are showcasing). This was done one 23 of the 100 cores that are available. So this was only 23% of the full capacity. Some cores are already sold to other chains therefore we can't do a full test. But you can guesstimate the numbers, right? And since the last spammening the throughput has gone up. We could now probably do like 250k TPS from 23 cores or something like that. Just look at the "Performance Charts" on the page I linked. The fees were literally almost always below 0.05$. The fees were around 0.03 to 0.015$ even when the network handled 140k TPS. Do you remember how Solana halted the network literally 8x due to it being congested and shit like that? That can't happen on DOT. The average finality was 16.58s. The thing is though, we'll soon be getting 500ms blocks. When the tests were conducted the block times were still 12s? Now they're 6s and soon they'll be 500ms (Basti blocks). A lot is happening on DOT this year!
Also if you look at the stats the network has been growing over time https://data.parity.io/parachain-stats?selection-mode=include&frequency=daily

62080949
>>62079649
Also combine that with the new tokenomics and the long term vision for the project... I really don't see this project becoming irrelevant to be honest. It simply JUST FUCKING DOES WHAT IT'S SUPPOSED TO DO. The other L2s are behind and they won't catch up ever in my opinion. Once JAM hits DOT will be AT LEAST 5 to 10 years ahead of all the major L2s and L1s. It's not even comparable to be honest. People are blind to not see it. Sooner or later people will wake up and realize "OMG, I've been a degenerate memecoin gambler while I could buy the Vishnu of the blockchain".
Simply put, this project does what others promise and don't deliver. DOT has already DELIVERED and is DELIVERING even more amazing things that no other chain has and if they do they don't package it like DOT does. Sure ICP has continous compute, but does it have native interoperability and can host L2s and smart contracts and has 500ms block times and is decentralized and has shared security to his L2s and has the best governance system in crypto and has over a few million TPS and has ... and has ... Bro, it's fucking impossible to beat DOT on technical superiority. Some day people will realize that they can't build a new use case on the other chains. That they're LIMITING THEMSELVES by staying on shit like ARB or POL or some other fucking shit like that. A few months back Polkadot Asset Hub launched and people can simply copy paste EVM code to DOT and it'll work. We're currently waiting for this referendum (https://polkadot.polkassembly.io/referenda/1864) to pass in order for Uniswap and Safe to launch on Asset Hub. Other major projects will probably follow. Should pass any day now. Slow and steady wins the race

62081930
>>62079750
>>62080914
>>62080937
>>62080949

Why should we believe some one from India

62082053
>>62081930
Truth is not to be believed. Truth is to be seen. Just try the chain out. And look at the data. I've provided you with plenty of evidence. You SHOULD NOT believe me. The essence of crypto is what? DYOR. Do Your Own Research. We really did forget our roots, didn't we?

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62082374
>>62081930
I actually applaud you to be honest. Anon, I'm proud of you. Thank you for having CRITICAL thinking. We need more people like you. And again DYOR and you WILL come to similar if not EXACTLY THE SAME conclusions. I dare you, I double dare you, I triple dare you.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62084668
100$ end of bull run

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62085029
75.
y2029

62085250
>>62026429
imagine being really hard to develop on, because your system uses a particularly confusing superset of rust, and then scrambling to make an EVM to attract more developers. no sympathy for rust faggots.

62081505

62081534

62081592

62081771
>>62080322
Bro everyone knows youre miserable, broke, and you still live with your parents in your late 20s. You will never get a gf cuz they all see you as an inept weird piece of garbage.
Have fun beating your meat to hentai for the 137th time this month. And dont even deny this, i seee you idiots all the time on discord. You literally say shit like this as cope, every day i hear "im gonna fix my life" and it never comes. In reality you wish you were normal like the rest, but youre not. Youre just a freak that will undoubtly die alone.

62081773
>>62081771
That's the kind of attitude I like, wagie, see you at 06:00 sharp

62081779
>>62081773
Just spitting facts, i havent seen 1 single neet that is genuinely happy with his position in life. The vast majority are doomers waiting for a societal collapse that will never come.
Besides a couple of neets ive seen that had the luck to be trustfund kids, all the rest that are broke and do it from their parents house live shameful miserable lives as social outcasts and shit on wagies as cope.

62081797
>>62081779
yeah, i would not want to be a neet. i have been unemployed by choice before a couple of times but it gets old after a couple of months.

62081802
>>62081773
Holy based, owned that freak. Hes writing FUMING paragraphs while we respond with one sentence memes.

62081816
>>62081802
Yet you read it fully, you worthless neet fuck. Cant escape the truth, the clock doesnt tick only for the wagie, with each passing day you dig deeper into your hole from which you will never be able to escape.

62081819
>>62081816

62081820
>>62081773

>>62081771

62081943
>>62080487

62081949
>>62080322

62081969
>>62080475
absolutely american response

62082067
>>62080516

62082497
>>62080959

"return to monke" isn't a good solution, imo. according to his beliefs everything is just fucked

62082534
>>62081969
It’s actually mostly jeets that are obsessed with black penis

62082580
>>62082534
Doesn't matter if the accounts are in India, they're still white women having sex with Black men

62082599
>>62082580
you misread "bcc" as "bbc". you are brainwashed or psyopping. either way, kill yourself. White girls that fuck black men, view them as dogs. Both parties do it for attention, "so edgy".

62082639
>>62082534
Indians are pathetic. Only blacks are less desireable by whites than them.

62085226
WFH will not return, it will never happens.
> Loss of property value, something the big corp invested in
> The stupid and underqualified manager class will get sad
> Boomers will get sad, and we live in a gerontocracy, so this cannot happens. They also did not have access to this, and they categorically refuse any advancement they did not had access to.
> Bad optics, it might reveal that most desk-jobs are a daycare for adults.
> People would use less their cars, and big oil is against that : Less oil consumption, less insurance premium.

It would solve a lot of issues though. People would use less cars and transportations, thus less carbon emissions, they would live farther, and put less pressure in high-density areas like big cities, and pretty much solve a whole battery of problems, but it won't come back.
You'll get to the cagie, maybe get one, two days at home, and do you job like a nice little wagie.

62085247
>>62080322
>Posted from an open plan office at OPs entry level job

62085253
>>62081534
Based
